steps.t: Hórin is waiting to proceed inside Thyrstáth. You should talk to Hórin.
You should walk through Thyrstáth with Hórin until you find the ice-giant chieftain.
Hórin is standing outside the throne-room in Thyrstáth. You should talk to Hórin.
Hórin is negotiating with the ice-giant chieftain. You should listen to the conversation.
You are held in place by a dark force!
